title: EXPERIMENT_NODE_V1
description: Single node in the Experiment Lineage Graph. Records one experiment: what was mutated, what the outcome was, and who the parent is. Non-sovereign — authority=NONE. Forms the append-only ELG alongside siblings.

parent_experiment_id.description: Parent experiment in the lineage. Null for root node.

skill_id.description: Skill being improved by this experiment.

candidate_version.description: Semantic version of the candidate being evaluated.

mutation_family.description: Class of mutation attempted. Frozen enum — drives trajectory grouping.

eval_receipt_hash.description: SHA-256 of the AUTORESEARCH_EVAL_RECEIPT_V1 for this experiment.

promotion_case_hash.description: SHA-256 of the AUTORESEARCH_PROMOTION_CASE_V1 submitted for this experiment.

experiment_hash.description: SHA-256 of the full experiment descriptor. Load-bearing provenance.

reducer_decision.description: Reducer verdict on the promotion case.
